_comment: COVID mid-crisis — VIX 41→54 on 2020-03-09. Window already contains the Feb 24 spike and subsequent elevated readings, demonstrating window absorption: despite a bigger absolute move than Feb 24, z-score is lower because the window has absorbed the crisis ramp.

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: Window absorption in action. VIX moved from 41.94 to 54.46 — a 12.5-point jump — but the 20-day window already includes the Feb 24-28 ramp (mean=24.63, std=10.83), so z=+2.75 and severity is only ~0.14. Compare to Volmageddon's 0.88 or even COVID Feb 24's 0.31 — the window has 'learned' the crisis. Band [0.10, 0.17] covers tanh_scale 18-22. A trader would still be sweating at VIX 54, but the z-score model is blind to regime — it only sees deviation from recent history.
